query: SELECT id, title, authorName FROM book_profiles WHERE title IN ('Book PDF', 'Charles Duhigg', 'David Brooks', 'Jefferson-Fisher-Open-Graph') OR id LIKE 'bk_rand%' OR title LIKE '%Open-Graph%' OR (authorName IS NULL AND title NOT LIKE '%:%') ORDER BY title;
